center.name: 楠考里島
center.summary: 楠考里島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Nicobar bulbul，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Nicobar Islands, where it only occurs in the central group, namely Bompoka, Camorta, Katchall, Nancowry, Teressa, Tillanchong and Trinkat; a supposed 19th century record from Pilo Milo in the southern group is nowadays generally dismissed. Its natural habitats are subtropical and tropical moist lowland primary and secondary forest
